Geocache Description:

I am very pleased to present the Czech Republic's first webcam Cache! Since the Webcam isn't very detailed, I've made this a combo webcam/virtual cache. The Questions you must answer are: What Languages are on the statues on the bridge? (Hint: there are more than one)
What is the Lavka? (Hint: take a good look at the water, but not the river.)

Times Square Webcam Virtual Cache

SHOW US YOUR SMILE!

This cache requires a team effort!

What you will need:

A GPS
A friend at his/her computer with an internet connection.
A mobile phone or set time when you will be at the cache site.
How to find and claim this webcam virtual cache:

Go to the coordinates of this cache.

The coordinates get you in the area of the cache. They are not exact coordinates telling you where to stand. You, with the help of your friend, need to "hunt" for the cache.
Call your friend and have them go to this image, (visit link)
Smile for the camera and wait for an update! (this webcam updates every few minutes)
When your friend sees a good webcam picture, have them right click on the webcam picture and save the image. Then send you the picture so that...
When you make your Found it! log entry you can include the picture in the log.
Found it! logs without proper pictures will be deleted. Don't log it until you have your picture ready for upload.

Disclamers:

We do not own or control this webcam.
We do not get any warning when this camera is down for mainenance and/or repair. If the webcam is not working, for any reason, a photo taken of you at the cache site is acceptiable. Enshure, that you are seen in the picture and it is obvious that you are at the cache site.
This webcam may be reposistion at any time. For the best picture possable you should use a moble phone so your friend can position you for the best possible picture.
Original webcam virtual cache idea by: Frankfurt Webcam Virtual Cache by mrudy.
